response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise, with notable contributions to event-driven architectures and AI-agent tooling. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of executive-level leadership, multi-agent AI production experience in fintech, or scaling engineering teams to 30+ members—critical requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq).
Diverse technical background spanning fintech-adjacent domains (e.g., pricing optimization at Optilyz).
concerns: No clear track record of executive leadership or scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 members.
Multi-agent AI experience appears limited to tooling/frameworks rather than production-grade fintech applications.
Lacks explicit evidence of operating AI systems in regulated environments or architecting real-time credit-risk/liquidity systems.
